title: [Goal] Config consolidation: resolve workshop/core-ui overlap + mode switcher toggle
description:
## Description

Two config files govern the storyboard UI chrome with overlapping concerns:

- **storyboard.config.json** (project root, client-owned) has workshop.enabled, workshop.features, and modes.enabled
- **core-ui.config.json** (packages/core, package-owned) has menus (including workshop-related create menu) and modes[] definitions

The workshop section in storyboard.config.json overlaps with core-ui.config.json — both influence whether the create button appears, from different files with different ownership. Client repos also have no way to hide specific UI elements or lock the mode switcher to a specific mode.

This goal establishes storyboard.config.json as the project-level override layer on top of core-ui.config.json defaults:

1. Add modes.locked config to lock the experience to a specific mode and hide the switcher
2. Add ui.hide config to let client repos hide specific menus from the CoreUIBar
3. Clean up workshop.enabled (redundant with hasAnyWorkshopFeature check) and clarify the config boundary

Scope: config loading, modes.js, ModeSwitch.svelte, CoreUIBar.svelte, data-plugin.js, server-plugin.js. Does not change core-ui.config.json itself — it stays as the package-level defaults.

## Tasks

- [x] **#g015#t01**: Add locked mode support to modes.js — initModesConfig stores locked name, getLockedMode/isModeSwitcherVisible exports, activateMode no-op when locked
- [x] **#g015#t02**: Update ModeSwitch.svelte and modeStore.ts to respect locked mode and hide switcher
- [x] **#g015#t03**: Create uiConfig.js module with initUIConfig/isMenuHidden for ui.hide config
- [x] **#g015#t04**: Update CoreUIBar.svelte to filter menus via isMenuHidden from uiConfig
- [x] **#g015#t05**: Update data-plugin.js to generate initUIConfig and pass locked to initModesConfig
- [x] **#g015#t06**: Remove workshop.enabled from server-plugin.js — use hasAnyWorkshopFeature as sole gate
- [x] **#g015#t07**: Update storyboard.config.json to remove workshop.enabled and apply new config shape
- [x] **#g015#t08**: Add tests for locked mode behavior in modes.test.js and ModeSwitch.test.ts
- [x] **#g015#t09**: Add tests for uiConfig.js hide logic
- [x] **#g015#t10**: Toggle mode switcher visibility with Cmd+. alongside CoreUIBar

---
_Managed by clips • Goal ID: #g015_
